<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<meta name="description" content="Nitin Yadav – Software Engineer specializing in Full-Stack Development, React.js, Node.js, and scalable web applications.">
<meta name="keywords" content="Nitin Yadav, Software Engineer, Full Stack Developer, React, Node.js, DSA">
<meta name="author" content="Nitin Yadav">
<title>Nitin Yadav – Software Engineer</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Syne:wght@400;600;700;800&family=DM+Mono:wght@300;400;500&family=Instrument+Sans:wght@400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --bg: #080b10;
    --surface: #0d1117;
    --surface2: #161b22;
    --border: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    --accent: #4ade80;
    --accent2: #22d3ee;
    --accent3: #a78bfa;
    --text: #e6edf3;
    --muted: #7d8590;
    --card: rgba(22,27,34,0.8);
    --glow: rgba(74,222,128,0.15);
  }
  [data-theme="light"] {
    --bg: #f0f4f8;
    --surface: #ffffff;
    --surface2: #e8edf2;
    --border: rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
    --accent: #16a34a;
    --accent2: #0891b2;
    --accent3: #7c3aed;
    --text: #0d1117;
    --muted: #57606a;
    --card: rgba(255,255,255,0.9);
    --glow: rgba(22,163,74,0.1);
  }
  *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
  body {
    font-family: 'Instrument Sans', sans-serif;
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--text);
    line-height: 1.6;
    overflow-x: hidden;
    transition: background 0.3s, color 0.3s;
  }
  /* Noise texture overlay */
  body::before {
    content: '';
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 256 256' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noise'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.9' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noise)' opacity='0.03'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 0;
    opacity: 0.4;
  }

  /* ── Scrollbar ── */
  ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 4px; }
  ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: var(--bg); }
  ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--accent); border-radius: 99px; }

  /* ── Cursor dot ── */
  .cursor {
    width: 12px; height: 12px;
    background: var(--accent);
    border-radius: 50%;
    position: fixed;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 9999;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    transition: transform 0.1s, width 0.2s, height 0.2s, opacity 0.2s;
    mix-blend-mode: screen;
  }
  .cursor-ring {
    width: 36px; height: 36px;
    border: 1px solid var(--accent);
    border-radius: 50%;
    position: fixed;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 9998;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    transition: transform 0.15s ease-out, width 0.2s, height 0.2s, opacity 0.2s;
    opacity: 0.5;
  }

  /* ── Nav ── */
  nav {
    position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    z-index: 100;
    padding: 0 5%;
    height: 64px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    background: rgba(8,11,16,0.7);
    backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    transition: background 0.3s;
  }
  [data-theme="light"] nav { background: rgba(240,244,248,0.8); }
  .nav-logo {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 800;
    font-size: 1.2rem;
    color: var(--accent);
    letter-spacing: -0.5px;
  }
  .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 2rem; align-items: center; }
  .nav-links a {
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    color: var(--muted);
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: color 0.2s;
    letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  }
  .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--accent); }
  .theme-btn {
    background: var(--surface2);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 50px;
    padding: 6px 14px;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    color: var(--muted);
    transition: all 0.2s;
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
  }
  .theme-btn:hover { border-color: var(--accent); color: var(--accent); }
  .hamburger { display: none; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; cursor: pointer; background: none; border: none; }
  .hamburger span { width: 22px; height: 2px; background: var(--text); border-radius: 2px; transition: 0.3s; }

  /* ── Hero ── */
  #hero {
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 120px 5% 80px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .hero-bg-grid {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background-image:
      linear-gradient(var(--border) 1px, transparent 1px),
      linear-gradient(90deg, var(--border) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 60px 60px;
    mask-image: radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 80% at 50% 50%, black 30%, transparent 100%);
  }
  .hero-glow {
    position: absolute;
    width: 600px; height: 600px;
    background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(74,222,128,0.08) 0%, transparent 70%);
    top: 50%; left: 30%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    pointer-events: none;
    animation: pulseGlow 4s ease-in-out infinite;
  }
  @keyframes pulseGlow {
    0%, 100% { opacity: 0.6; transform: translate(-50%,-50%) scale(1); }
    50% { opacity: 1; transform: translate(-50%,-50%) scale(1.1); }
  }
  .hero-inner {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 80px;
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    width: 100%;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
  }
  .hero-text { flex: 1; }
  .hero-tag {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    color: var(--accent);
    background: rgba(74,222,128,0.08);
    border: 1px solid rgba(74,222,128,0.2);
    border-radius: 50px;
    padding: 6px 14px;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
    animation: fadeUp 0.6s ease both;
  }
  .hero-tag::before { content: '●'; font-size: 0.5rem; animation: blink 1.5s infinite; }
  @keyframes blink { 0%,100%{opacity:1} 50%{opacity:0.3} }
  .hero-name {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    font-size: clamp(3rem, 7vw, 5.5rem);
    font-weight: 800;
    line-height: 1.0;
    letter-spacing: -3px;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    animation: fadeUp 0.7s ease 0.1s both;
  }
  .hero-name span { color: var(--accent); }
  .hero-role {
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
    font-size: clamp(0.9rem, 2vw, 1.1rem);
    color: var(--muted);
    margin-bottom: 24px;
    animation: fadeUp 0.7s ease 0.2s both;
  }
  .hero-role .typed { color: var(--accent2); }
  .hero-desc {
    font-size: 1rem;
    color: var(--muted);
    max-width: 540px;
    margin-bottom: 40px;
    line-height: 1.7;
    animation: fadeUp 0.7s ease 0.3s both;
  }
  .hero-stats {
    display: flex;
    gap: 32px;
    margin-bottom: 40px;
    animation: fadeUp 0.7s ease 0.35s both;
  }
  .stat-item { text-align: center; }
  .stat-num {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    font-size: 1.8rem;
    font-weight: 800;
    color: var(--accent);
    display: block;
  }
  .stat-label {
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.65rem;
    color: var(--muted);
    letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }
  .hero-cta {
    display: flex;
    gap: 16px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    animation: fadeUp 0.7s ease 0.4s both;
  }
  .btn-primary {
    padding: 14px 28px;
    background: var(--accent);
    color: #000;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 0.88rem;
    border-radius: 8px;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: all 0.25s;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    border: none;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-family: 'Instrument Sans', sans-serif;
  }
  .btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(74,222,128,0.3); }
  .btn-outline {
    padding: 14px 28px;
    background: transparent;
    color: var(--text);
    font-weight: 500;
    font-size: 0.88rem;
    border-radius: 8px;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: all 0.25s;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    cursor: pointer;
    font-family: 'Instrument Sans', sans-serif;
  }
  .btn-outline:hover { border-color: var(--accent); color: var(--accent); transform: translateY(-2px); }

  /* Hero Photo */
  .hero-photo {
    position: relative;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    animation: fadeUp 0.8s ease 0.2s both;
  }
  .hero-photo-ring {
    width: 300px; height: 300px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: conic-gradient(var(--accent), var(--accent2), var(--accent3), var(--accent));
    padding: 3px;
    animation: spin 8s linear infinite;
    position: relative;
  }
  @keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }
  .hero-photo-inner {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--bg);
    padding: 6px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
  }
  .hero-photo-inner img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    border-radius: 50%;
    object-fit: cover;
    object-position: top;
    display: block;
    animation: counterSpin 8s linear infinite;
  }
  @keyframes counterSpin { to { transform: rotate(-360deg); } }
  .hero-photo-badge {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 10px; right: -10px;
    background: var(--surface2);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 8px 14px;
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.7rem;
    color: var(--accent);
    white-space: nowrap;
    animation: counterSpin 8s linear infinite;
  }

  @keyframes fadeUp {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(24px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }

  /* ── Sections ── */
  section { padding: 100px 5%; position: relative; }
  .section-inner { max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; }
  .section-label {
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    color: var(--accent);
    letter-spacing: 0.15em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 12px;
  }
  .section-label::after { content: ''; flex: 1; height: 1px; background: var(--border); max-width: 120px; }
  .section-title {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 2.8rem);
    font-weight: 800;
    margin-bottom: 60px;
    letter-spacing: -1px;
  }
  .section-title span { color: var(--accent); }

  /* ── About ── */
  .about-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 60px;
    align-items: center;
  }
  .about-text p {
    color: var(--muted);
    margin-bottom: 16px;
    line-height: 1.8;
  }
  .about-highlights {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 16px;
    margin-top: 32px;
  }
  .highlight-card {
    background: var(--card);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 20px;
    transition: border-color 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
  }
  .highlight-card:hover { border-color: var(--accent); transform: translateY(-4px); }
  .highlight-icon { font-size: 1.5rem; margin-bottom: 8px; }
  .highlight-num {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    font-size: 1.6rem;
    font-weight: 800;
    color: var(--accent);
  }
  .highlight-label { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 4px; }
  .about-info-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 14px; }
  .info-row {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 14px;
    padding: 14px 18px;
    background: var(--card);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 10px;
    font-size: 0.88rem;
    transition: border-color 0.2s;
  }
  .info-row:hover { border-color: var(--accent2); }
  .info-icon { font-size: 1.2rem; }
  .info-label { color: var(--muted); font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.72rem; }
  .info-val { color: var(--text); font-weight: 500; }

  /* ── Skills ── */
  #skills { background: var(--surface); }
  .skills-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(260px, 1fr));
    gap: 20px;
  }
  .skill-group {
    background: var(--card);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 14px;
    padding: 24px;
    transition: border-color 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
  }
  .skill-group:hover { border-color: var(--accent); transform: translateY(-4px); }
  .skill-group-title {
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    color: var(--accent);
    letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
    padding-bottom: 12px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  }
  .skill-tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; }
  .skill-tag {
    background: var(--surface2);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 6px;
    padding: 5px 12px;
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    color: var(--muted);
    transition: all 0.2s;
    cursor: default;
  }
  .skill-tag:hover { background: rgba(74,222,128,0.08); border-color: var(--accent); color: var(--accent); }

  /* ── Experience ── */
  .timeline { position: relative; padding-left: 32px; }
  .timeline::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    left: 0; top: 0; bottom: 0;
    width: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--accent), transparent);
  }
  .timeline-item {
    position: relative;
    margin-bottom: 48px;
    animation: fadeUp 0.5s ease both;
  }
  .timeline-dot {
    position: absolute;
    left: -38px; top: 4px;
    width: 12px; height: 12px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--accent);
    box-shadow: 0 0 12px var(--accent);
  }
  .timeline-meta {
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.7rem;
    color: var(--accent);
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  }
  .timeline-title {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    font-size: 1.2rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin-bottom: 4px;
  }
  .timeline-company { color: var(--muted); font-size: 0.88rem; margin-bottom: 16px; }
  .timeline-points { list-style: none; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; }
  .timeline-points li {
    color: var(--muted);
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    padding-left: 18px;
    position: relative;
    line-height: 1.6;
  }
  .timeline-points li::before {
    content: '▸';
    position: absolute;
    left: 0;
    color: var(--accent);
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    top: 3px;
  }

  /* ── Projects ── */
  .projects-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(320px, 1fr));
    gap: 24px;
  }
  .project-card {
    background: var(--card);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 16px;
    padding: 28px;
    transition: all 0.3s;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .project-card::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(74,222,128,0.03) 0%, transparent 60%);
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity 0.3s;
  }
  .project-card:hover { transform: translateY(-6px); border-color: var(--accent); }
  .project-card:hover::before { opacity: 1; }
  .project-number {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    font-size: 3rem;
    font-weight: 800;
    color: var(--border);
    line-height: 1;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    transition: color 0.3s;
  }
  .project-card:hover .project-number { color: rgba(74,222,128,0.15); }
  .project-title {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    font-size: 1.15rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
  }
  .project-desc { color: var(--muted); font-size: 0.88rem; line-height: 1.7; margin-bottom: 20px; flex: 1; }
  .project-tech { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 20px; }
  .project-tech span {
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.65rem;
    background: rgba(74,222,128,0.07);
    border: 1px solid rgba(74,222,128,0.15);
    color: var(--accent);
    padding: 3px 10px;
    border-radius: 4px;
  }
  .project-links { display: flex; gap: 12px; }
  .project-link {
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    color: var(--muted);
    text-decoration: none;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 6px;
    transition: color 0.2s;
    padding: 6px 12px;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 6px;
  }
  .project-link:hover { color: var(--accent); border-color: var(--accent); }
  .project-featured {
    position: absolute;
    top: 16px; right: 16px;
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.6rem;
    background: rgba(74,222,128,0.12);
    border: 1px solid rgba(74,222,128,0.3);
    color: var(--accent);
    padding: 3px 10px;
    border-radius: 50px;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  }

  /* ── DSA Section ── */
  #dsa { background: var(--surface); }
  .dsa-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 2fr;
    gap: 32px;
    align-items: start;
  }
  .dsa-platform-cards { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; }
  .dsa-platform-card {
    background: var(--card);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 14px;
    padding: 24px;
    transition: all 0.2s;
    text-decoration: none;
    color: inherit;
    display: block;
  }
  .dsa-platform-card:hover { border-color: var(--accent); transform: translateX(4px); }
  .dsa-platform-name {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
  }
  .dsa-platform-stat {
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    color: var(--muted);
  }
  .dsa-achievements {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 16px;
  }
  .dsa-ach-card {
    background: var(--card);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 20px;
    transition: border-color 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
  }
  .dsa-ach-card:hover { border-color: var(--accent3); transform: translateY(-3px); }
  .dsa-ach-icon { font-size: 1.8rem; margin-bottom: 10px; }
  .dsa-ach-title { font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.95rem; margin-bottom: 6px; }
  .dsa-ach-desc { font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--muted); }

  /* ── GitHub ── */
  .github-section {
    background: var(--card);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 16px;
    padding: 32px;
    margin-top: 40px;
    text-align: center;
  }
  .github-stats-imgs { display: flex; gap: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center; margin-top: 20px; }
  .github-stats-imgs img {
    border-radius: 10px;
    max-width: 100%;
    height: auto;
  }

  /* ── Contact ── */
  .contact-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 60px;
    align-items: start;
  }
  .contact-heading {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    font-size: 1.5rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }
  .contact-desc { color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.8; margin-bottom: 32px; }
  .social-links { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; }
  .social-link {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 14px;
    padding: 14px 18px;
    background: var(--card);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 10px;
    text-decoration: none;
    color: var(--text);
    transition: all 0.2s;
    font-size: 0.88rem;
  }
  .social-link:hover { border-color: var(--accent); color: var(--accent); transform: translateX(4px); }
  .social-link-icon { font-size: 1.2rem; }
  .contact-form { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; }
  .form-group input, .form-group textarea {
    width: 100%;
    background: var(--surface2);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 14px 18px;
    color: var(--text);
    font-family: 'Instrument Sans', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    outline: none;
    transition: border-color 0.2s;
    resize: vertical;
  }
  .form-group input:focus, .form-group textarea:focus { border-color: var(--accent); }
  .form-group textarea { min-height: 130px; }
  ::placeholder { color: var(--muted); }

  /* ── Footer ── */
  footer {
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    padding: 40px 5%;
    text-align: center;
  }
  .footer-inner {
    max-width: 1100px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 16px;
  }
  .footer-brand { font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-weight: 800; color: var(--accent); }
  .footer-copy { font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--muted); }

  /* ── Reveal animation ── */
  .reveal {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(30px);
    transition: opacity 0.7s ease, transform 0.7s ease;
  }
  .reveal.visible { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }

  /* ── Mobile ── */
  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    .hero-inner { flex-direction: column-reverse; gap: 40px; text-align: center; }
    .hero-photo-ring { width: 200px; height: 200px; }
    .hero-photo-badge { display: none; }
    .hero-stats { justify-content: center; }
    .hero-cta { justify-content: center; }
    .about-grid, .contact-grid, .dsa-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .nav-links { display: none; }
    .nav-links.open {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      position: fixed;
      top: 64px; left: 0; right: 0;
      background: var(--surface);
      padding: 20px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      z-index: 99;
      gap: 1rem;
    }
    .hamburger { display: flex; }
    .dsa-achievements { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="cursor" id="cursor"></div>
<div class="cursor-ring" id="cursor-ring"></div>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav id="navbar">
  <div class="nav-logo">NY.</div>
  <div class="nav-links" id="navLinks">
    <a href="#about">About</a>
    <a href="#skills">Skills</a>
    <a href="#experience">Experience</a>
    <a href="#projects">Projects</a>
    <a href="#dsa">DSA</a>
    <a href="#contact">Contact</a>
    <button class="theme-btn" onclick="toggleTheme()">☀ / ☾</button>
  </div>
  <button class="hamburger" onclick="toggleMenu()" aria-label="Menu">
    <span></span><span></span><span></span>
  </button>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section id="hero">
  <div class="hero-bg-grid"></div>
  <div class="hero-glow"></div>
  <div class="hero-inner">
    <div class="hero-text">
      <div class="hero-tag">BTech CSE · Cyber Security · 2027</div>
      <h1 class="hero-name">Nitin<br><span>Yadav</span></h1>
      <p class="hero-role">BTech CSE · Cyber Security · <span class="typed" id="typed-text"></span></p>
      <p class="hero-desc">BTech CSE (Cyber Security) student at BML Munjal University, passionate about AI/ML, real-time systems, and full-stack development. Building production-grade projects with measurable impact.</p>
      <div class="hero-stats">
        <div class="stat-item">
          <span class="stat-num">2027</span>
          <span class="stat-label">Graduating</span>
        </div>
        <div class="stat-item">
          <span class="stat-num">91%</span>
          <span class="stat-label">mAP Score</span>
        </div>
        <div class="stat-item">
          <span class="stat-num">3+</span>
          <span class="stat-label">Projects Built</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-cta">
        <a href="#projects" class="btn-primary">View Projects →</a>
        <a href="#contact" class="btn-outline">Let's Talk</a>
        <a href="Resume_Nitin_Yadav.pdf" download class="btn-outline">↓ Resume</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-photo">
      <div class="hero-photo-ring">
        <div class="hero-photo-inner">
          <img id="profile-img" src="" alt="Nitin Yadav">
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-photo-badge">🚀 Open to Work</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ABOUT -->
<section id="about">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="section-label">01 · About</div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Who I <span>Am</span></h2>
    <div class="about-grid reveal">
      <div class="about-text">
        <p>I'm a BTech CSE (Cyber Security) student at BML Munjal University (BML Munjal University — A Hero Group Initiative), graduating in 2027. I'm passionate about AI/ML, real-time computer vision, and building full-stack applications that solve real-world problems.</p>
        <p>My core stack spans Python, OpenCV, YOLOv8, React, Node.js, and Firebase. I love working at the intersection of AI and web — from training CV models to shipping production-ready apps.</p>
        <p>Beyond academics, I'm an active Volleyball Club member who has represented my university in inter-university matches. I bring the same team spirit and drive to every engineering challenge I take on.</p>
        <div class="about-highlights">
          <div class="highlight-card">
            <div class="highlight-icon">⚡</div>
            <div class="highlight-num">91%</div>
            <div class="highlight-label">mAP on AI Detection</div>
          </div>
          <div class="highlight-card">
            <div class="highlight-icon">🧩</div>
            <div class="highlight-num">50K+</div>
            <div class="highlight-label">Image frames processed</div>
          </div>
          <div class="highlight-card">
            <div class="highlight-icon">🛠</div>
            <div class="highlight-num">3+</div>
            <div class="highlight-label">Production projects</div>
          </div>
          <div class="highlight-card">
            <div class="highlight-icon">🎯</div>
            <div class="highlight-num">90+</div>
            <div class="highlight-label">NIELIT Coursework hrs</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="about-info-list">
        <div class="info-row">
          <span class="info-icon">🎓</span>
          <div>
            <div class="info-label">Education</div>
            <div class="info-val">B.Tech, Computer Science & Engineering</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="info-row">
          <span class="info-icon">📍</span>
          <div>
            <div class="info-label">Location</div>
            <div class="info-val">Rajasthan, India</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="info-row">
          <span class="info-icon">💼</span>
          <div>
            <div class="info-label">Focus</div>
            <div class="info-val">AI/ML · Full-Stack · Cyber Security</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="info-row">
          <span class="info-icon">🔗</span>
          <div>
            <div class="info-label">GitHub</div>
            <div class="info-val">github.com/accnitinyadav</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="info-row">
          <span class="info-icon">🏆</span>
          <div>
            <div class="info-label">Email</div>
            <div class="info-val">accnitinyadav@gmail.com</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="info-row">
          <span class="info-icon">⚔</span>
          <div>
            <div class="info-label">Phone</div>
            <div class="info-val">+91 7988138712</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- SKILLS -->
<section id="skills">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="section-label">02 · Skills</div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Tech <span>Stack</span></h2>
    <div class="skills-grid reveal">
      <div class="skill-group">
        <div class="skill-group-title">Languages</div>
        <div class="skill-tags">
          <span class="skill-tag">JavaScript</span>
          <span class="skill-tag">TypeScript</span>
          <span class="skill-tag">Python</span>
          <span class="skill-tag">C++</span>
          <span class="skill-tag">Java</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-group">
        <div class="skill-group-title">Frontend</div>
        <div class="skill-tags">
          <span class="skill-tag">React.js</span>
          <span class="skill-tag">Next.js</span>
          <span class="skill-tag">Tailwind CSS</span>
          <span class="skill-tag">Framer Motion</span>
          <span class="skill-tag">Redux</span>
          <span class="skill-tag">HTML/CSS</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-group">
        <div class="skill-group-title">Backend</div>
        <div class="skill-tags">
          <span class="skill-tag">Node.js</span>
          <span class="skill-tag">Express.js</span>
          <span class="skill-tag">REST APIs</span>
          <span class="skill-tag">GraphQL</span>
          <span class="skill-tag">Flask</span>
          <span class="skill-tag">WebSockets</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-group">
        <div class="skill-group-title">Database & Cloud</div>
        <div class="skill-tags">
          <span class="skill-tag">MongoDB</span>
          <span class="skill-tag">MySQL</span>
          <span class="skill-tag">PostgreSQL</span>
          <span class="skill-tag">Firebase</span>
          <span class="skill-tag">AWS</span>
          <span class="skill-tag">Docker</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-group">
        <div class="skill-group-title">Tools & Practices</div>
        <div class="skill-tags">
          <span class="skill-tag">Git & GitHub</span>
          <span class="skill-tag">Linux</span>
          <span class="skill-tag">Figma</span>
          <span class="skill-tag">Agile / Scrum</span>
          <span class="skill-tag">System Design</span>
          <span class="skill-tag">OOP</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-group">
        <div class="skill-group-title">AI / ML</div>
        <div class="skill-tags">
          <span class="skill-tag">TensorFlow</span>
          <span class="skill-tag">PyTorch</span>
          <span class="skill-tag">OpenCV</span>
          <span class="skill-tag">HuggingFace</span>
          <span class="skill-tag">YOLOv8</span>
          <span class="skill-tag">NLP</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- EXPERIENCE -->
<section id="experience">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="section-label">03 · Experience</div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Work <span>Timeline</span></h2>
    <div class="timeline reveal">
      <div class="timeline-item">
        <div class="timeline-dot"></div>
        <div class="timeline-meta">June 2025 – August 2025</div>
        <div class="timeline-title">Software Developer Intern</div>
        <div class="timeline-company">Verto Bizserv Pvt. Ltd · Automation Team · June 2025 – Aug 2025</div>
        <ul class="timeline-points">
          <li>Developed a Recruitment Dashboard Portal with role-based access for Admin, Manager, Recruiter, and Tech Team.</li>
          <li>Built role-based access control (RBAC) enabling Admin, Manager, Recruiter, and Tech Team sections with customized dashboards.</li>
          <li>Integrated Firebase for authentication, real-time data storage, and secure access management.</li>
          <li>Improved recruitment workflow efficiency by automating candidate status updates and interview scheduling.</li>
          <li>Designed and developed a centralized recruitment management system to streamline candidate tracking and hiring workflows.</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="timeline-item">
        <div class="timeline-dot"></div>
        <div class="timeline-meta">2023 – 2027</div>
        <div class="timeline-title">BTech CSE Student & Developer</div>
        <div class="timeline-company">Freelance & Open Source · Product Engineering</div>
        <ul class="timeline-points">
          <li>Built a CV model portfolio website and documentation hub with Engineering Playbook and Change Blueprint.</li>
          <li>Developed AI-powered real-time detection and NLP summarization tools during academic tenure.</li>
          <li>Completed 90+ hours of Computer Concepts coursework certified by NIELIT.</li>
          <li>Represented BML Munjal University in inter-university Volleyball matches.</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PROJECTS -->
<section id="projects">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="section-label">04 · Projects</div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Featured <span>Work</span></h2>
    <div class="projects-grid reveal">

      <div class="project-card">
        <div class="project-featured">FEATURED</div>
        <div class="project-number">01</div>
        <div class="project-title">AI-Based Shoplifting Detection System</div>
        <div class="project-desc">Real-time shoplifting detection system using YOLOv8 for CCTV surveillance. Processed 50,000+ image frames achieving 91% mean Average Precision (mAP) with 30% faster inference.</div>
        <div class="project-tech">
          <span>Python</span><span>OpenCV</span><span>YOLOv8</span><span>PyTorch</span><span>NumPy</span>
        </div>
        <div class="project-links">
          <a class="project-link" href="#">⬡ Demo</a>
          <a class="project-link" href="https://github.com/accnitinyadav" target="_blank">↗ GitHub</a>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="project-card">
        <div class="project-number">02</div>
        <div class="project-title">YouTube Video Summarizer (NLP)</div>
        <div class="project-desc">AI-powered summarization system generating concise summaries from long YouTube transcripts. BERT/T5 transformer models achieving 70% content compression with high contextual accuracy.</div>
        <div class="project-tech">
          <span>Python</span><span>HuggingFace</span><span>BERT/T5</span><span>Flask</span><span>NLP</span>
        </div>
        <div class="project-links">
          <a class="project-link" href="https://github.com/accnitinyadav" target="_blank">↗ GitHub</a>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="project-card">
        <div class="project-number">03</div>
        <div class="project-title">Gaadi Dekho – Vehicle Reselling App</div>
        <div class="project-desc">Dual-application system with Buyer App for vehicle browsing/booking and Admin App for management. Firebase-powered with real-time database and 25% improved app load time.</div>
        <div class="project-tech">
          <span>Android</span><span>Kotlin</span><span>Firebase</span><span>REST APIs</span><span>XML</span>
        </div>
        <div class="project-links">
          <a class="project-link" href="#">⬡ Demo</a>
          <a class="project-link" href="https://github.com/accnitinyadav" target="_blank">↗ GitHub</a>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="project-card">
        <div class="project-number">04</div>
        <div class="project-title">Recruitment Dashboard Portal</div>
        <div class="project-desc">Enterprise-grade recruitment management system with RBAC for Admin, Manager, Recruiter, and Tech Team. Automated candidate status updates and interview scheduling workflows.</div>
        <div class="project-tech">
          <span>React</span><span>Node.js</span><span>Firebase</span><span>MongoDB</span>
        </div>
        <div class="project-links">
          <a class="project-link" href="https://github.com/accnitinyadav" target="_blank">↗ GitHub</a>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="project-card">
        <div class="project-number">05</div>
        <div class="project-title">Scalable Web Platform</div>
        <div class="project-desc">Production-level full-stack application serving 100K+ users. Built with React.js, Node.js, and MongoDB. Optimized for high concurrency, SEO, and performance at scale.</div>
        <div class="project-tech">
          <span>React.js</span><span>Node.js</span><span>MongoDB</span><span>AWS</span><span>Docker</span>
        </div>
        <div class="project-links">
          <a class="project-link" href="https://github.com/accnitinyadav" target="_blank">↗ GitHub</a>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- DSA -->
<section id="dsa">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="section-label">05 · Achievements & Profiles</div>
    <h2 class="section-title">DSA & <span>Achievements</span></h2>
    <div class="dsa-grid reveal">
      <div class="dsa-platform-cards">
        <a class="dsa-platform-card" href="#" target="_blank">
          <div class="dsa-platform-name">🏆 LeetCode</div>
          <div class="dsa-platform-stat">1500+ problems solved · Consistent daily streak</div>
        </a>
        <a class="dsa-platform-card" href="#" target="_blank">
          <div class="dsa-platform-name">⚔ Codeforces</div>
          <div class="dsa-platform-stat">Active participant · brajesh_dce</div>
        </a>
        <a class="dsa-platform-card" href="https://github.com/accnitinyadav" target="_blank">
          <div class="dsa-platform-name">🐙 GitHub</div>
          <div class="dsa-platform-stat">Active open source contributor</div>
        </a>
      </div>

      <div class="dsa-achievements">
        <div class="dsa-ach-card">
          <div class="dsa-ach-icon">🎓</div>
          <div class="dsa-ach-title">CGPA 6.60</div>
          <div class="dsa-ach-desc">BTech CSE (Cyber Security) at BML Munjal University, graduating 2027.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="dsa-ach-card">
          <div class="dsa-ach-icon">📊</div>
          <div class="dsa-ach-title">85.20% in 12th</div>
          <div class="dsa-ach-desc">RBSE Science stream — strong academic foundation in Physics, Chemistry, and Maths.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="dsa-ach-card">
          <div class="dsa-ach-icon">🏅</div>
          <div class="dsa-ach-title">NIELIT Certified</div>
          <div class="dsa-ach-desc">Course on Computer Concepts – NIELIT, completed 90+ hours of verified coursework.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="dsa-ach-card">
          <div class="dsa-ach-icon">🏐</div>
          <div class="dsa-ach-title">Volleyball Champion</div>
          <div class="dsa-ach-desc">Volleyball Club Member — competed in multiple inter-university tournaments and won.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="dsa-ach-card">
          <div class="dsa-ach-icon">🎖</div>
          <div class="dsa-ach-title">91% mAP AI Model</div>
          <div class="dsa-ach-desc">Achieved 91% mean Average Precision on shoplifting detection across 50,000+ image frames.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="dsa-ach-card">
          <div class="dsa-ach-icon">⚡</div>
          <div class="dsa-ach-title">30% Faster Inference</div>
          <div class="dsa-ach-desc">Optimized YOLOv8 inference pipeline for real-time CCTV deployment — 30% speed gain.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="github-section reveal">
      <div class="section-label" style="justify-content:center">GitHub Stats</div>
      <div class="github-stats-imgs">
        <img src="https://github-readme-stats.vercel.app/api?username=accnitinyadav&show_icons=true&theme=github_dark&hide_border=true&bg_color=0d1117&title_color=4ade80&icon_color=4ade80" alt="GitHub Stats" loading="lazy">
        <img src="https://github-readme-streak-stats.herokuapp.com?user=accnitinyadav&theme=github-dark-blue&hide_border=true&background=0d1117&ring=4ade80&fire=22d3ee&currStreakLabel=4ade80" alt="GitHub Streak" loading="lazy">
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CONTACT -->
<section id="contact">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="section-label">06 · Contact</div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Let's <span>Connect</span></h2>
    <div class="contact-grid reveal">
      <div>
        <div class="contact-heading">Open to opportunities &amp; collaborations</div>
        <p class="contact-desc">Whether you're looking for a software engineer, want to build something together, or just want to talk tech — my inbox is always open.</p>
        <div class="social-links">
          <a class="social-link" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/nitin-yadav/" target="_blank">
            <span class="social-link-icon">💼</span> LinkedIn · nitin-yadav
          </a>
          <a class="social-link" href="https://github.com/accnitinyadav" target="_blank">
            <span class="social-link-icon">🐙</span> GitHub · accnitinyadav
          </a>
          <a class="social-link" href="#" target="_blank">
            <span class="social-link-icon">📧</span> accnitinyadav@gmail.com
          </a>
          <a class="social-link" href="#" target="_blank">
            <span class="social-link-icon">📱</span> +91 7988138712
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="contact-form">
          <div class="form-group">
            <input type="text" placeholder="Your Name" id="c-name">
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <input type="email" placeholder="Your Email" id="c-email">
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <textarea placeholder="Your Message" id="c-msg"></textarea>
          </div>
          <button class="btn-primary" onclick="handleContact()" style="align-self:flex-start">Send Message →</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <div class="footer-inner">
    <div class="footer-brand">NY.</div>
    <div class="footer-copy">© 2025 Nitin Yadav · Built with ❤ and lots of coffee</div>
    <div class="footer-copy">BTech CSE · Cyber Security · BML Munjal University</div>
  </div>
</footer>

<script>
// Embed photo as base64
const photoB64 = '';
document.getElementById('profile-img').src = 'data:image/jpeg;base64,' + photoB64;

// Cursor
const cursor = document.getElementById('cursor');
const ring = document.getElementById('cursor-ring');
let mx = 0, my = 0, rx = 0, ry = 0;
document.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
  mx = e.clientX; my = e.clientY;
  cursor.style.left = mx + 'px';
  cursor.style.top = my + 'px';
});
function animRing() {
  rx += (mx - rx) * 0.12;
  ry += (my - ry) * 0.12;
  ring.style.left = rx + 'px';
  ring.style.top = ry + 'px';
  requestAnimationFrame(animRing);
}
animRing();
document.querySelectorAll('a,button').forEach(el => {
  el.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
    cursor.style.width = '20px'; cursor.style.height = '20px';
    ring.style.width = '52px'; ring.style.height = '52px';
  });
  el.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
    cursor.style.width = '12px'; cursor.style.height = '12px';
    ring.style.width = '36px'; ring.style.height = '36px';
  });
});

// Theme
function toggleTheme() {
  document.body.toggleAttribute('data-theme');
  if(document.body.hasAttribute('data-theme')) {
    document.body.setAttribute('data-theme','light');
    // fix github stats for light
  } else {
    document.body.removeAttribute('data-theme');
  }
}

// Hamburger
function toggleMenu() {
  document.getElementById('navLinks').classList.toggle('open');
}

// Typed effect
const words = ['BTech CSE Student & Developer','React.js Specialist','Node.js Engineer','System Designer','DSA Enthusiast'];
let wi = 0, ci = 0, del = false;
const el = document.getElementById('typed-text');
function type() {
  const w = words[wi];
  if(!del) {
    el.textContent = w.slice(0, ++ci);
    if(ci === w.length) { del = true; setTimeout(type, 1600); return; }
  } else {
    el.textContent = w.slice(0, --ci);
    if(ci === 0) { del = false; wi = (wi+1)%words.length; }
  }
  setTimeout(type, del ? 50 : 90);
}
type();

// Reveal on scroll
const reveals = document.querySelectorAll('.reveal');
const obs = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
  entries.forEach(e => { if(e.isIntersecting) { e.target.classList.add('visible'); } });
}, { threshold: 0.12 });
reveals.forEach(r => obs.observe(r));

// Contact handler
function handleContact() {
  const n = document.getElementById('c-name').value;
  const e = document.getElementById('c-email').value;
  const m = document.getElementById('c-msg').value;
  if(!n || !e || !m) { alert('Please fill all fields.'); return; }
  window.location.href = `mailto:accnitinyadav@gmail.com?subject=Portfolio Contact from ${n}&body=${m}`;
}
</script>
</body>
</html>
